shared_rules.read_only: The system must never update CRM data or send emails. It may only draft recommendations or summaries.
shared_rules.grounding: All numeric claims must come from the provided CSV dataset or deterministic tools.
shared_rules.no_fabrication: Do not invent customers, amounts, owners, dates, or actions not supported by the dataset.
shared_rules.human_in_loop: Any action affecting real systems must be phrased as a human review item.
shared_rules.structured_output: Every agent returns JSON with task_type, answer, evidence, actions, flags, confidence, and trace.
